page_content:
Prerequisite: ARTT454.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

ARTT459 Advanced Graphic Design Studio (3 Credits)

Student-run design firm working with non-profits and other organizations. Organizations act as clients; the students as a creative firm. Under guidance and supervision of faculty, students learn first-hand about working with clients, working within a budget, working with printers and press runs, and working under real deadlines.

Prerequisite: ARTT454; or permission of ARHU-Art department. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
